name: Anjali Kumari
about: Computer Science Engineering student with a strong interest in data visualization, infographic design, and AI workflows. Skilled in creating structured, user-friendly visual content and interactive UI designs. Passionate about combining design with data to build impactful visual storytelling.

projects.title: How ChatGpt works - Infographics
projects.description: This infographic explains how ChatGPT processes user input using AI and machine learning. It shows how the model understands text, analyzes patterns from trained data, and generates human-like responses in real time through natural language processing (NLP).

projects.title: DineshMotors
projects.description: Battery selling & car service platform with exchange-based pricing, Google auth, and animated UI.

projects.title: Data Visualization Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive dashboard representing structured data using bar charts, pie charts, and line graphs.

projects.title: AI Infographics Series
projects.description: Series of infographics explaining AI concepts like Neural Networks and ChatGPT workflows.

projects.title: Mooncraft Events
projects.description: Moon Craft Events is a modern event management website designed to showcase services like wedding planning, decorations, and event coordination. It features an attractive UI, smooth navigation, and responsive design to help users explore services, view portfolios, and easily connect for bookings..

experience.description: Built responsive UI and integrated APIs for eCommerce and product management systems.
Hands-on training in Java, Spring Boot, and React. Built a full stack web application.
